fullName:
com.blockether.spel.daemon-test.Tests that ensure-browser! surfaces meaningful errors when core/* calls fail.
   Mocks core functions to return anomaly maps and verifies the error message
   is descriptive instead of a raw ClassCastException..normal path — launch-chromium returns anomaly.throws with 'Failed to launch browser' and the underlying error message
name:
Tests that ensure-browser! surfaces meaningful errors when core/* calls fail.
   Mocks core functions to return anomaly maps and verifies the error message
   is descriptive instead of a raw ClassCastException. > normal path — launch-chromium returns anomaly > throws with 'Failed to launch browser' and the underlying error message
